description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
SAP ASE server hostname
HTTPS port for the REST API

REST API for SAP Adaptive Server Enterprise (ASE) administration and monitoring. Provides programmatic access to server configuration, database management, performance monitoring, user administration, and backup operations for SAP ASE database instances. SAP ASE is a high-performance relational database management system designed for transaction-based enterprise applications.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
